title: 受控同件 pair 离线策略 TODO（单数据集研究计划）

project.generalization_boundary: No independent validation parts are available. Results are single-dataset regression evidence and must not be presented as proven cross-part generalization.

global_rules.runtime_reference_policy: Production selector, pipeline, candidate generation, and their tests must not read reference STEP, truth mapping, evaluation results, dataset identity, face ID, part ID, SHA, known counts, or labels.
fixed_production_boundaries: Production defaults, production CLI behavior, and candidate generation are not changed by this TODO.
Accepted pairs require positive exact projected overlap.
Weak supporting pairs must not be aggregated to select a face.
offline_data_policy: Policy generation and replay may consume only registered primary-model geometry and offline pair audits.
Reference STEP and truth may be consumed only by explicit offline evaluation and reporting layers.
Topology rules must be derived from OCCT shape boundaries; body names, assembly hierarchy, part names, face IDs, and labels are not policy features.
Unknown or insufficient topology is rejected for controlled same-part acceptance.
step_completion_policy: Each step starts pass=false and is changed to true only after all strict tests pass.
A no-feasible-policy conclusion is a valid completion result when its required diagnosis, search, and evidence tests pass.
Each completed step updates DEVLOG.md and TODO pass state in the same commit.
After weld_core changes run full pytest; before commit run git diff --check; after commit git status --short must be empty.

steps.goal: Freeze the permanent offline-only controlled same-part research contract, strict overall quality gate, and known baseline without changing production selection.
changes: Record cross-part default TP/FP/FN=30/6/10 and unconstrained same-part offline TP/FP/FN=40/172/0.
Record OP08's gap-only upper TP=33 below target TP=37 and replace that unreachable route with controlled same-part research.
Record the additive impossibility: retaining 30/6/10 and adding ten TP with zero FP yields only 40/46 precision, so a successful search must uniformly re-screen cross-part and same-part pairs.
State that all results remain single-dataset offline evidence and cannot promote same-part production behavior.
steps.completion_commit: chore: freeze controlled same-part research contract

steps.goal: Offline-only, diagnose exact same-part pair geometry and shape-derived topology before policy search.
changes: Replay same-part pairs satisfying the fixed 0.5-degree normal and 1.5-mm gap bounds, calculate exact projected overlap once, and write a managed JSON/Markdown diagnosis.
Classify topology deterministically and pair-order-independently as shared_edge, shared_vertex_only, disjoint_boundaries, or topology_unknown using OCCT shape boundaries only.
Record same-part relation, topology class, exact area, both coverages, effective width, score=common_area_mm2*min(coverage_a,coverage_b), gap, reason, and recovery status for every reviewed pair.

Use truth only in the report to give TP/FP/FN composition by topology class, same-part FN theoretical recovery ceiling, and whether all exact-valid same-part pairs can reach TP>=37; do not expose truth to policy generation.

strict_tests.command: .venv\Scripts\python -c "import json; p='data/component-simplify/20260723-105708-recall-optimization/general_plane_selection_same_part_topology_diagnosis.json'; d=json.load(open(p, encoding='utf8')); assert d['scope'] == 'offline_same_part_topology_diagnosis'; assert d['production_behavior_changed'] is False"

steps.goal: Build an offline-only deterministic replay and search for a controlled policy that uniformly re-screens cross-part and same-part pairs.
changes: Generate one permissive exact pair audit from registered primary-model geometry, then replay every candidate policy without repeated identical OCP boolean operations.
Apply one global geometry gate to all pairs; same-part pairs additionally require a topology rule and can never be accepted through a weaker path than cross-part pairs.

Search the fixed matrix: max normal angle=0.5 degrees; max gap=1.5 mm; min area=[1,5,10,25,50,100] mm2; min coverage=[0.05,0.10,0.20,0.40,0.60,0.80]; min effective width=[0.1,1,3,5,10] mm; min score=[0,1,5,10,25,50,100] mm2; same-part topology=[no_constraint,exclude_shared_edge,disjoint_boundaries_only].
Always reject topology_unknown for controlled same-part acceptance. Select faces only from individually accepted supporting pairs; do not aggregate weak pairs.
For every policy, emit canonical parameters, selected faces, supporting pairs, accepted same-part/cross-part counts, TP/FP/FN, precision, recall, pass state, and rejection attribution.

strict_tests.command: .venv\Scripts\python -c "import json; p='data/component-simplify/20260723-105708-recall-optimization/general_plane_selection_controlled_pair_policy_search.json'; d=json.load(open(p, encoding='utf8')); assert d['scope'] == 'offline_controlled_pair_policy_search'; assert d['production_behavior_changed'] is False"

steps.completion_commit: feat: search controlled same-part pair policy

steps.goal: Publish complete, reproducible offline evidence for the controlled same-part research result without changing production behavior.
changes: Create and register topology diagnosis, policy-search, and conclusion JSON/Markdown artifacts in a new managed run directory.

Report the unconstrained same-part risk baseline, topology-class outcomes, and either the deterministically selected strict-pass policy with its full ordering evidence or an explicit no-feasible-policy conclusion.
Reaffirm allow_same_part_pairs=false and unchanged production defaults regardless of search result; a strict-pass result is only offline evidence for a future independent design review.
Update README and JSON contract with artifact semantics, offline-only scope, no-generalization boundary, and the fact that reference/truth are evaluation-only inputs.

strict_tests.command: .venv\Scripts\python -c "import json; p='data/component-simplify/20260723-105708-recall-optimization/general_plane_selection_controlled_same_part_conclusion.json'; d=json.load(open(p, encoding='utf8')); assert d['production_defaults_changed'] is False; assert d['production_guardrail']['allow_same_part_pairs'] is False"

steps.completion_commit: feat: conclude controlled same-part offline research
